content.query:
SELECT 
[Division]
,[SalesRep1_EmployeeID] as SalesRep_EmployeeID
,1 as SalesRepPosition
,COUNT([IssuedLeadID]) AS IssuedLeadCount
,MIN([ApptDate]) as EarliestAppointmentDate
,sum(case when [NetIssued] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as NetIssuedCount
,sum(case when [Sat] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as SatCount
,sum(case when [Sold] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as SoldCount
,sum([GrossSalesAmount]) as GrossSalesAmount
 FROM [EDW].[FACT_ISSUED_LEAD]
 group BY
[Division]
,[SalesRep1_EmployeeID]
UNION
SELECT 
[Division]
,[SalesRep2_EmployeeID] as SalesRep_EmployeeID
,2 as SalesRepPosition
,COUNT([IssuedLeadID]) AS IssuedLeadCount
,MIN([ApptDate]) as EarliestAppointmentDate
,sum(case when [NetIssued] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as NetIssuedCount
,sum(case when [Sat] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as SatCount
,sum(case when [Sold] = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as SoldCount
,sum([GrossSalesAmount]) as GrossSalesAmount
 FROM [EDW].[FACT_ISSUED_LEAD]
 group BY
[Division]
,[SalesRep2_EmployeeID]
